notes: M=1537>1024 forces Mp=2048 (only feasible ALLOWED_M). N=257 pads to 512, K=769 pads to 1024. All three strategies (hashmap_27, sorted_first_fit, preprocessed_map) converge on the same padded shape (2048,512,1024) with bf16 best tile (64,64,64) at 1700.23us. preprocessed_map selected as winner due to lowest decision overhead (~2us vs ~15-25us). Padding cost dominates total latency (13611us >> 1700us execution). Elements padded = 3,670,016 > 500,000 threshold, so numpy_pad chosen over manual_copy.
